message:
🐛 fix tile mount with retry logic for container dimensions (#50)

- Replace single setTimeout with retry loop that checks el.clientHeight > 0
- Use tabsRef.current for fresh checked tabs in retry callbacks
- Always re-mount terminals into tile containers (remove stale container check)
- Retry up to 20 times (100ms intervals) waiting for styled-components CSS

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
